description_long: This is a rectangular chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, set on what appears to be a fabric or canvas surface. The board is bordered by a plain, unadorned edge that is slightly frayed, suggesting a portable or travel-style design. Arranged on the board are two full sets of chess pieces, one set in white and the other in black, each occupying their standard starting positions. The chess pieces are traditional in shape, with distinguishable pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings, and appear to be made of plastic or a similar lightweight material. The surface of the board shows some texture and wear, indicating regular use, and the overall construction is relatively thin and flexible. The chessboard is suitable for casual play in outdoor or urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A portable chessboard with a fabric border and a classic 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, featuring full sets of white and black chess pieces in starting positions.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the black side, showing all black pieces in the foreground and white pieces in the background, with the alternating squares clearly visible.
description_view_1: A side view of the chessboard, displaying both sets of pieces lined up along the left and right edges, and the board's thin, fabric-like border.
description_view_2: The chessboard is viewed from the white side, with all white pieces in the foreground and black pieces in the background, highlighting the symmetry of the setup.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction of view 1, showing the white pieces on the left and black pieces on the right, with the board's edge visible.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular grid of alternating light and dark squares, each square being perfectly square-shaped and arranged in a classic checkerboard pattern. The squares are bordered by a plain, slightly frayed fabric edge, with no decorative elements or inscriptions.
attribute_border_design: The border is a simple, unadorned fabric edge in a beige color, slightly frayed and wider than the grid squares, with no ornamentation, markings, or inscriptions.
